title: nervilia pectinata
intro: Nervilia pectinata, also known as the fan petal orchid or lesser yam, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Nervilia pectinata has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing swelling, and treating digestive issues. Nervilia pectinata can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
